cause_of_action: OTHER CIVIL PETITIONS (TO APPOINT DIRECTOR TO CORPORATION)

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING FOR PETITION TO APPOINT DIRECTOR TO CORPORATION WHERE NO SHARES ARE ISSUED AND ALL DIRECTORS HAVE DIED PURSUANT TO CAL. CORPS. CODE 7220(E) (TRANSACTION ID # 17170037) FILED BY PETITIONER EBERT, JANAE HEARING SET FOR JUN-30-2017 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 17170037) FILED BY PETITIONER EBERT, JANAE
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-30-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
PETITION TO APPOINT DIRECTOR TO CORPORATION FILED BY PETITIONER EBERT, JANAE AS TO RESPONDENT SHINE ON FARMS

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER JANAE EBERT'S PETITION TO APPOINT DIRECTOR TO CORPORATION WHERE NO SHARES ARE ISSUED AND ALL DIRECTORS HAVE DIED PURSUANT TO CAL. CORPS. CODE 7220(E) IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING REFILED. THE COURT WILL NOT ENTERTAIN THIS PETITION: 1) ABSENT SERVICE OF THE PETITION PAPERS ON AND OPPORTUNITY TO OPPOSE THE PETITION GIVEN TO THE REPRESENTATIVE OF THE LEO HARTZ' ESTATE; AND A 2) A SATISFACTORY EXPLANATION WHY THE PETITION HAS BEEN FILED IN THIS COUNTY WHEN THERE APPEARS TO BE NO RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN THIS COUNTY AND THE PETITIONER OR THE CORPORATION. (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S NOTES) MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR	711, CKAREN@SFTC.ORG

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing For Petition To Appoint Director To Corporation Where No Shares Are Issued And All Directors Have Died Pursuant To Cal. Corps. Code 7220(E)
Off Calendar Jun-30-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jay Purcell, Esq. (415-432-7990) of Rogoway Law for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER JANAE EBERT'S Petition To Appoint Director To Corporation Where No Shares Are Issued And All Directors Have Died Pursuant To Cal. Corps. Code 7220(E) is DENIED without prejudice to being refiled. The court will not entertain this petition: 1) absent service of the petition papers on and opportunity to oppose the petition given to the representative of the Leo Hartz' estate; and a 2) a satisfactory explanation why the petition has been filed in this county when there appears to be no relationship between this county and the petitioner or the corporation. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)
